title: knowltonia major
intro: Knowltonia major, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species native to southern Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The medicinal properties of Knowltonia major are attributed to its active compound, harpagoside, which has been shown to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Devil's Claw can be found in capsule, tablet, or tincture form, and are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, fibromyalgia, and digestive issues.
